transform_log.summary: Restructured SUPPLIER__SONGPET into standard {meta,data,ops,compliance,history,links}. Batches are treated as prevision (not requested) and legacy snapshots preserved under history. No notes.todo section added in this patch.

exchanged_assets_index.delivery_note: Logos Meow Paw Paw livrÃ©s Ã  Vicci Chen (Songpet) le 2025-10-15 â€” version transparente, 300 dpi.

terminal_run_history_2026.summary: SongwayPet carried the launch run up to packaging, cartonization, FBA shipment creation and carton labels, but the DDP/customs clearance rail failed at execution because the forwarder treated catnip as plant material. The run was cancelled before dispatch and refunded via Alibaba Trade Assurance.

timeline.summary: Alibaba deposit paid for SongwayPet launch run.
Amazon FBA shipment FBA15LSK0YD6 created; carton labels generated and sent to supplier.
After balance payment and final checks, supplier/forwarder stated that DDP/customs clearance could not be handled because catnip was considered plant material.
Refund requested and accepted via Alibaba Trade Assurance. Approved refund: 945.00 USD, Qonto refund visible at +408.30 EUR, final reconciliation pending May statement.
Amazon shipment FBA15LSK0YD6 cancelled before dispatch; no tracking and no stock shipped.
Source of Truth updated after SongwayPet cancelled run.

lessons_learned.summary: Supplier-level DDP claims are not sufficient. Future catnip/silvervine/gallfruit/natural plant material runs require explicit written confirmation from the forwarder for the exact product, Amazon FBA France, DDP door-to-door, customs clearance handled by supplier/forwarder, and no buyer customs clearance.
